title: Today's AI Brief: Rethinking organizational design in the age of agentic AI
summary: A look at the impact of agentic AI on organizational design and two stories from the world of AI adoption.
imageAlt: Image from source article for Rethinking organizational design in the age of agentic AI
imageCaption: Rethinking organizational design in the age of agentic AI
imageSourceTitle: Rethinking organizational design in the age of agentic AI

body.text: I'm Leo Stone, and I'm here to walk you through the latest on AI. We're seeing a shift in how organizations are thinking about their design, thanks to the rise of agentic AI. This type of AI can act more independently, making decisions and taking actions on its own. It's a big deal, and companies are trying to figure out how to make the most of it.

First up, a report from MIT Technology Review caught my eye. It seems that while 85% of organizations want to leverage agentic AI, there's a disconnect between ambition and execution. The idea is that these AI agents can help companies make decisions and take actions on their own, but it's not happening as smoothly as hoped. My read is that companies are still figuring out how to integrate these tools effectively.

Also making news, AdventHealth is using OpenAI's ChatGPT for Healthcare to streamline their workflows. The goal is to reduce administrative burden and give healthcare professionals more time to focus on patient care. I think it's interesting to see how AI can help simplify things, especially in industries like healthcare where every minute counts.

And in other news, it's worth noting that the use of AI in healthcare is becoming more prevalent. While there are many potential benefits, it's also important to consider the challenges and limitations of implementing these technologies.

My quick read: the artificial intelligence story keeps getting bigger, but also stranger in very human ways. One moment it is strategy and infrastructure; the next, the Vatican is in the room. That is a pretty good sign this technology has left the lab and wandered into the town square.
